expectations.text: Recommends Nano Banana 2 / gemini-3.1-flash-image for the high-volume thumbnails
Recommends Nano Banana Pro / gemini-3-pro-image for the text-heavy hero banners
States 512 (0.5K) is Flash-only and Pro cannot generate 512
expectations.evidence: '512 is a valid imageSize on Flash only (Pro starts at 1K)'

expectations.text: Uses correct per-image pricing: Flash 512 ~$0.045, Pro 1K/2K ~$0.134
Computes a sane monthly thumbnail cost (~$2,250 for 50k at $0.045)
